name: Email Bot — A: Ingest → Classify → Draft → Sheets

parameters.query: SELECT id, status FROM email_logs WHERE message_id = $1 LIMIT 1;
INSERT INTO email_logs (message_id, thread_id, from_address, subject, body_text, received_at, status) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,'processing') ON CONFLICT (message_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING id;

options.queryParams: ={{ [$('Extract & Sanitize Email').item.json.message_id, $('Extract & Sanitize Email').item.json.thread_id, $('Extract & Sanitize Email').item.json.from_address, $('Extract & Sanitize Email').item.json.subject, $('Extract & Sanitize Email').item.json.body_text, $('Extract & Sanitize Email').item.json.received_at] }}

parameters.query: UPDATE email_logs SET status='loop_blocked', last_error=$2 WHERE message_id=$1;
UPDATE email_logs SET status='no_reply_needed', category=$2, sentiment_score=$3, confidence=$4 WHERE message_id=$1;
SELECT from_address, subject, body_text, draft_body, sent_at FROM email_logs WHERE thread_id=$1 AND status='sent' ORDER BY received_at DESC LIMIT 3;

UPDATE email_logs SET category=$2, sentiment_score=$3, confidence=$4, draft_subject=$5, draft_body=$6, draft_reasoning=$7, token_usage=$8::jsonb, approval_status='PENDING', status='awaiting_approval' WHERE message_id=$1;

nodes.name: Add to Google Sheets for Approval

parameters.query: INSERT INTO leads (account_id, email_address, name, domain, last_seen_at, email_count, avg_sentiment, stage) VALUES (1, $1, $2, $3, NOW(), 1, $4, CASE WHEN $4 > 0.5 THEN 'warm' ELSE 'cold' END) ON CONFLICT (account_id, email_address) DO UPDATE SET last_seen_at=NOW(), email_count=leads.email_count+1, avg_sentiment=ROUND(((leads.avg_sentiment * leads.email_count + $4) / (leads.email_count + 1))::numeric, 3), stage=CASE WHEN leads.avg_sentiment > 0.6 THEN 'hot' WHEN leads.avg_sentiment > 0.2 THEN 'warm' ELSE leads.stage END;

main.node: Add to Google Sheets for Approval
